notes: SUB-01 golden anchors for the ergonomics engine (NIOSH revised 1991 lifting equation + RULA McAtamney & Corlett 1993 + REBA Hignett & McAtamney 2000).
Tolerances: NIOSH RWL +/-0.05 kg; NIOSH LI +/-0.01; RULA grand_score and REBA final_score are integers -> EXACT equality (no float tolerance).

NIOSH multipliers are computed and rounded to 2dp per the published worksheet convention, then multiplied (matches the cross-confirmed worked chain 23 x 0.83 x 0.78 x 0.85 x 1.00 x 1.00 x 0.90 = 11.39).

Invalid / must-raise cases (negative weight, out-of-NIOSH-domain H/V/A, out-of-range joint scores) are NOT in this fixture; they live in test_ergonomics.py and assert ErgonomicsInputError (D-03 fail-loud).

cases.why: Cross-confirmed NIOSH worked example: 23 x 0.83 x 0.78 x 0.85 x 1.00 x 1.00 x 0.90 = 11.39 kg (tumeke.io / ergo-plus NIOSH worksheet). HM=25/30=0.83, VM=1-0.003|2-75|=0.78, DM=0.82+4.5/150=0.85, AM=1-0.0032*0=1.00, FM(low-freq,<=1h)=1.00, CM(fair,V<75)=0.90. LI=13.0/11.39=1.14 -> elevated.

All-multipliers-1 ideal lift (H<=25 -> HM=1, V=75 -> VM=1, D<25 -> DM=1, A=0 -> AM=1, low freq -> FM=1, good coupling -> CM=1): RWL = LC = 23 kg, the NIOSH ceiling. LI=5/23=0.22 -> nominal risk. Boundary anchor (ergo-plus / CCOHS).

RULA worked posture (ergo-plus RULA worksheet structure): Table A posture(ua3,la2,wr2,wt1)=4 + muscle0 + force1 -> Score A=5; Table B posture(neck3,trunk3,legs1)=4 + muscle0 + force1 -> Score B=5; Table C(5,5)=6 -> grand 6 -> action level 3 (investigate and change soon).
RULA neutral-posture floor: Table A(1,1,1,1)=1, Table B(1,1,1)=1, Table C(1,1)=1 -> grand 1 -> action level 1 (acceptable). Lower-bound anchor.

REBA worked posture (ergo-plus REBA guide structure): Table A(neck2,trunk3,legs2)=5 + load1 -> Score A=6; Table B(upper4,lower1,wrist2)=5 + coupling1 -> Score B=6; Table C(6,6)=8 + activity1 -> final 9 -> action level 4 (high risk, necessary soon).
REBA neutral-posture floor: Table A(1,1,1)=1, Table B(1,1,1)=1, Table C(1,1)=1, activity0 -> final 1 -> action level 1 (negligible risk). Lower-bound anchor.
